# homekit -- Camera Operations

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED:START -->

## list_cameras

List all HomeKit cameras.

### Example

```bash
mcp2cli homekit list_cameras
```

## scrypted_list_cameras

List all cameras from Scrypted NVR with their capabilities (motion detection, audio, etc.).

### Example

```bash
mcp2cli homekit scrypted_list_cameras
```

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED:END -->
